nodes.long_description:
Discover a new world of music with HyperSpace Music, the ultimate VR app for Oculus headsets. HyperSpace Music revolutionizes your auditory experience by transforming your favorite MP3 tracks into breathtaking visual masterpieces.

Simply load your MP3 files into the default "music" folder on your headset, and let HyperSpace Music do the rest. Each song is brought to life through stunning, real-time visualizers that respond dynamically to the beats, rhythms, and melodies of your music. Whether you're grooving to pop, rocking out to metal, or relaxing with classical tunes, HyperSpace Music creates an immersive visual landscape that complements every genre.

Dive into a vibrant universe where sound and sight merge, offering an unparalleled sensory adventure. Customize your experience with various visual themes and effects, ensuring that no two journeys are ever the same. HyperSpace Music is perfect for music lovers, VR enthusiasts, and anyone looking to elevate their listening experience.

App Created by Krish T & Vicente M - Future Productions Films
Video Backgrounds - Björn Richter & TellSoto
Space Cover Art - Photo by Felix Mittermeier

LINKS:
http://www.future-productions.co.uk
https://dietechrecruiter.de/author/bj%C3%B6rn-richter/ 
https://www.pexels.com/photo/blue-universe-956981/

Load your favorite MP3 tracks into the music folder on your headset, and watch as HyperSpace Music transforms each song into an immersive visual experience, with vibrant, dynamic landscapes reacting in real-time to the beats and rhythms of your music.

nodes.change_log:
URGENT CRITICAL UPDATE:

Dear Hyperspace Travellers,

Welcome back to the journey through the stars! We’ve made three updates today to bring you even more exciting improvements and serious progress in Hyperspace Music.

Please install this latest update for the best experience.

Update Log:

Thrusters Upgraded: We've added more intricate details and flames to the starfighter thrusters, bringing more dynamic energy to your hyperspace journey.

Starfighter Formations: Starfighters now fly in tight formation with smoother, more detailed animations, offering a sense of precision and intensity during your missions.

Hyperspace Window: The hyperspace window layer has been opened and added, giving you a breathtaking visual experience as you blast through the cosmos.

Cinematic Color Correction: We’ve added cinematic color correction to some of the scenes, enhancing the overall visual tone and atmosphere.

Please note that these changes are temporary. Our team will be pushing the playlist feature in the next update after the 15th, and as a result, this visual work will need to be redone. It may not look quite the same afterward, so enjoy the current enhancements while they last!

We’re thrilled about the serious progress we've made and what it means for the future of your journey. Stay tuned for more exciting updates!

- The Hyperspace Music Team

URGENT CRITICAL UPDATE:

Dear Hyperspace Travellers,

Welcome back to the journey through the stars! Our latest update brings crucial improvements, fine-tuning your cosmic adventure with exciting new visual enhancements.

Update Log:

Thrusters Upgraded: We've added more intricate details and flames to the starfighter thrusters, bringing more dynamic energy to your hyperspace journey.

Starfighter Formations: Starfighters now fly in tight formation with smoother, more detailed animations, offering a sense of precision and intensity during your missions.

Hyperspace Window: The hyperspace window layer has been opened and added, giving you a breathtaking visual experience as you blast through the cosmos.

(Fixed where scene would not skip on Version 1.1.0)

Please note that these changes are temporary. Our team will be pushing the playlist feature in the next update after the 15th, and as a result, this visual work will need to be redone. It may not look quite the same afterward, so enjoy the current enhancements while they last!

We hope you enjoy these latest upgrades. Stay tuned for more exciting updates!

- The Hyperspace Music Team

Dear Hyperspace Travellers,

Welcome back to the journey through the stars! Our latest update is packed with new visual enhancements to make your cosmic adventure even more exhilarating.

Update Log:

Thrusters Upgraded: We've added more intricate details and flames to the starfighter thrusters, bringing more dynamic energy to your hyperspace journey.

Starfighter Formations: Starfighters now fly in tight formation with smoother, more detailed animations, offering a sense of precision and intensity during your missions.

Hyperspace Window: The hyperspace window layer has been opened and added, giving you a breathtaking visual experience as you blast through the cosmos.

Please note that these changes are temporary. Our team will be pushing the playlist feature in the next update after the 15th, and as a result, some of this visual work will need to be redone. It may not look quite the same afterward, so enjoy the current enhancements while they last!

We hope you enjoy these latest upgrades, and stay tuned for more exciting updates!

- The Hyperspace Music Team

Dear Hyperspace Travelers,

Buckle up, as we're taking another leap into the cosmos!

We're excited to announce that the visual experience in Hyperspace Music has improved and will improve further in the next update. 

Here's what's new:

Resolution Boost: We've started enhancing the overall visual quality! The cockpit resolution has received a notable upgrade, bringing sharper details to your journey through space.

Starfighter Visuals: The starfighter visuals have also been enhanced, delivering even more clarity as you navigate the abstract universe.

Upcoming Features: We're still hard at work on introducing a playlist feature, coming in the next update, so you can fully customize your musical journey!

As always, we remain dedicated to improving your experience with each update. Stay tuned for more exciting developments.

See you among the stars!

K - Hyperspace Music

Hyperspace Music VR - Update Changelog

Hey Hyperspace Pilots,

We’re excited to share the latest update for Hyperspace Music VR! � 

While we’re still fine-tuning the ships and working hard on a much-anticipated playlist feature for the next release, here’s what’s new in this version:

Adjusted Lighting: We’ve enhanced the in-game lighting for a more immersive experience.

Exterior Ship Details: New visual details have been added to the ships' exteriors to bring more depth and realism to your journey.
Basic Heads-Up Display (HUD): We’ve introduced a simple HUD behind the menu in the cockpit. It’s a work in progress, and we’ll be improving it over time!

Thank you for being a part of this journey. More exciting updates are on the horizon!

Happy flying, The Hyperspace Music Team
